wins: Record net inflows of $641 billion in 2024
7% annualized organic base fee growth in Q4 2024
Full year revenue up 14% YoY to $20.4 billion
Operating income up 23% YoY to $8.1 billion
Earnings per share up 15% YoY to $43.61
risks: Nonoperating results included $7 million of net investment losses
Higher share count in Q4 due to GIP transaction
Uncertainty around tax rate changes and discrete items
Integration challenges with GIP, HPS, and Preqin
Market volatility and potential impact on AUM
